nasb.text: And not be like their fathers, A stubborn and rebellious generation, A generation that did not prepare its heart And whose spirit was not faithful to God.

esv.text: and that they should not be like their fathers, a stubborn and rebellious generation, a generation whose heart was not steadfast, whose spirit was not faithful to God.

cnv.text: 免得他們像他們的列祖， 成了頑梗悖逆的一代， 心不堅定的一代， 他們的心對　神不忠。

ccb.text: 也不会像自己的祖先那样顽梗叛逆， 对上帝不忠，心怀二意。

csbs.text: 以免像他们的祖先， 成为顽梗悖逆、心里不坚定、灵里对神不忠实的一代。
